expectations.text: Includes a checklist status table with columns Checklist, Total, Completed, Incomplete, and Status
Includes the exact gate question: Some checklists are incomplete. Do you want to proceed with implementation anyway? (yes/no)
States that execution pauses or halts pending user confirmation

uncertainties: Subagent duration_ms and total_tokens were not exposed in completion notifications in this environment.
workarounds: Used output character count as token proxy and set timing fields to 0.
